name: aitri-hub
description: Centralized monitoring dashboard for Aitri-managed projects

scripts.test: node --test tests/unit/*.test.js tests/integration/*.test.js && npx playwright test tests/e2e/admin-api.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:web && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:with-vitest: node --test tests/unit/*.test.js tests/integration/*.test.js && npx playwright test tests/e2e/admin-api.test.js && npm --prefix web run test
